mechanism_narrative: A low FEDFUNDS reading after prior cuts keeps short-rate expectations anchored, but as inflation remains elevated the market reprices the path of policy toward fewer cuts and a higher term premium, lifting the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days.
regime_hint: late easing cycle with sticky inflation
failure_condition: The hypothesis is rejected if FEDFUNDS falls or stays flat while CPIAUCSL decelerates and the 10-year yield still rises in less than 40% of subsequent 20-day windows, or if yield changes are negative on average after the signal.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE above a near-term threshold signals deteriorating labor demand, which shifts Fed expectations toward easier policy and pushes the 10-year Treasury yield lower over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by higher 10-year yields in more than 60% of cases, or if the mean 20-day yield change is not negative after the trigger.

mechanism_narrative: When retail sales and industrial production both strengthen together, the market reads the signal as broader real-demand acceleration and anticipates higher real rates, which lifts the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS and INDPRO both rise month-over-month
failure_condition: Reject if joint rises in RSAFS and INDPRO do not outperform either series alone in predicting higher 20-day yields, or if the sign of the average yield response is negative in triggered months.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in INDPRO relative to GDPC1 indicates weakening supply utilization and slower real activity, which reduces inflation pressure and pushes the 10-year Treasury yield lower over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if periods of falling INDPRO relative to GDPC1 are followed by positive average 60-day yield changes, or if the effect disappears in any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp drop in HOUST below trend signals a housing slowdown that feeds into weaker future demand and lower inflation expectations, driving the 10-year Treasury yield down over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls more than 10% below its 6-month average
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside breaks are followed by rising yields in a majority of cases, or if the average 20-day yield response is not negative after the threshold is crossed.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL is accelerating while FEDFUNDS remains very low, the market infers policy is behind inflation, so term premia and expected future policy rates rise together and push the 10-year Treasury yield higher over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL inflation accelerates while FEDFUNDS stays below 1%
failure_condition: Reject if the inflation-policy gap does not produce higher yields within 5 trading days, or if triggered episodes have negative median yield changes.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-tightening labor slowdown, a flat or falling PAYEMS alongside a rising UNRATE confirms weakening hiring momentum, which lowers growth expectations and pulls the 10-year Treasury yield down over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS growth turns negative and UNRATE rises in the same month
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous PAYEMS weakness and UNRATE increases are not followed by lower yields more often than not, or if the average 20-day yield change is positive after the trigger.

mechanism_narrative: A synchronized slowdown in RSAFS, HOUST, and PAYEMS signals a broad demand freeze that reduces growth and inflation expectations, causing the 10-year Treasury yield to fall over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if joint weakness in sales, housing, and payrolls does not predict lower 60-day yields, or if one of the three series alone fully explains the effect and the interaction adds no incremental sign power.
